rubrics:
Вечірня: катизми нема. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 Октоїха, 3 свщмч., Сл., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар свщмч., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря свщмч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. свщмч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар свщмч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря свщмч. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і свщмч. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний свщмч., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар свщмч., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря свщмч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. свщмч.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – свщмч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 2 Кор. 195 зач.; 12, 10-19. Єв. – Мр. 16 зач.; 4, 10-23.

troparion_en.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, / you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, / you defended the Faith, even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Eutyches, entreat Christ God to save our souls.

kontakion_en.text: A successor of the Apostles and an excellent example to bishops, / Eutyches, you were glorified as a martyr. / You shone forth like the sun enlightening all, / dispelling the dark night of godlessness. / Therefore, we honor you as truly a godly celebrant of the Mysteries of Christ.

matched_oca_saint: Hieromartyr Eutyches, disciple of Saint John the Theologian

oca_saints.name: Hieromartyr Eutyches, disciple of Saint John the Theologian

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, / you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, / you defended the Faith, even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Eutyches, entreat Christ God to save our souls.

kontakion.text: A successor of the Apostles and an excellent example to bishops, / Eutyches, you were glorified as a martyr. / You shone forth like the sun enlightening all, / dispelling the dark night of godlessness. / Therefore, we honor you as truly a godly celebrant of the Mysteries of Christ.

oca_saints.name: Translation of the relics of Saint Peter, Metropolitan of Moscow and All Russia

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Peter, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Arsenius, Abbot of Komel, Vologda

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Arsenius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

Your holy martyr Tation, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Tation;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “Joseph was amazed...”)
Your lamb Syra, / calls out to You, O Jesus, in a loud voice: / “I love You, my Bridegroom, / and in seeking You, I endure suffering. / In baptism I was crucified so that I might reign in You, / and I died so that I might live with You. / Accept me as a pure sacrifice, / for I have offered myself in love.” / Through her prayers save our souls, since You are merciful.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
Finding your most revered temple to be a source of healing for our souls,  / we the faithful cry out to You with a loud voice:  / “O most renowned Virgin Martyr Syra,  / entreat Christ God unceasingly on behalf of us all.”

oca_saints.name: Saint George Limniotes, Confessor of Mount Olympus

troparion.text: Champion of Orthodoxy, teacher of purity and of true worship, / the enlightener of the universe and the adornment of hierarchs: / all-wise father George, your teachings have gleamed with light upon all things. / Intercede before Christ God to save our souls.

oca_saints.name: Repose of the New-Hieromartyr Cosmas of Aitolia, Equal of the Apostles

troparion.text: Let us gather to acclaim the renowned Cosmas with odes,  / who excelled gloriously among the choirs of the Martyrs, Priests, and Ascetics; /  for he dispenses healing to those who have recourse to him with faith,  / since, as an equal of the Apostles,  / he has boldness before Christ.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “Today the Virgin...”)
Having lived an irreproachable life on Athos, like Moses, /  you were deemed worthy of God's manifestation;  / therefore you truly gladden the Church exceedingly by your deeds and your divinely-inspired words,  / O Father Cosmas, having contended for them,  / you were adorned with a double crown.

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Martyrius, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Serapion the Wonderworker, Abbot of Saint John the Baptist Monastery

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Serapion, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
